CustomField.formula: IF(OR(TEXT(StageName) == 'Template', TEXT(StageName) == 'Tour'), 0, IF(sugati__O_Is_Group_Booking__c,IF(sugati__Adult_Old__c > 0, sugati__Adult_Old__c, sugati__O_Adult__c) + IF( sugati__O_Child_Old__c > 0, sugati__O_Child_Old__c, sugati__O_Children__c) + IF( sugati__O_Infant_Old__c > 0, sugati__O_Infant_Old__c, sugati__O_Infant__c)-3,IF(sugati__Adult_Old__c > 0, sugati__Adult_Old__c, sugati__O_Adult__c) + IF( sugati__O_Child_Old__c > 0, sugati__O_Child_Old__c, sugati__O_Children__c) + IF( sugati__O_Infant_Old__c > 0, sugati__O_Infant_Old__c, sugati__O_Infant__c)))
CustomField.label: Pax
